The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] '''Coronar''' was the site of an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] base during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the Empire's destruction of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Dankayo Base|base]] on [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]], several [[Datacard/Legends|datapacks]] were recovered from the ruins. They were consigned for analysis on Coronar aboard the [[Imperial Armored Transport]] [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']], but the shipment was [[Mission to destroy Elusive|intercepted]] by Alliance agents, and ''Elusive'' was destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
The base on Coronar is generally said to be an Imperial Intelligence facility in [[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]; the internal "opening crawl" of the adventure, however, says that the datapacks are destined for "an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] research facility."

As illustrated in [[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']], the battle between the Alliance shuttle ''[[Bonderium]]'' and Imperial transport ''Elusive'' took place near a banded [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] planet. The planet had several [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] spots and at least one cratered [[Moon/Legends|moon]]; but inasmuch as the Rebels used a [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projector]] to pull the ''Elusive'' from hyperspace before reaching her destination, this need not be the same system in which Coronar is located.

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
